summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Le Marche e-commerce platform. Backend APIs working excellently (96.7% success rate) with 18 products seeded and admin user created. Frontend loads well with all pages accessible, but admin authentication flow has issues preventing proper admin dashboard access.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns HTTP 200 instead of 201 when creating orders

critical_bugs.issue: Admin login successful but admin dashboard not accessible - shows 'Admin access required' notification and redirects to homepage

ui_bugs.issue: data-testid='products-page' selector not found, causing navigation tests to timeout

passed_tests: Admin API endpoints (stats, order management, product management)
Homepage loads with hero, categories, featured products
Products page loads and displays products
Contact page loads with contact form
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix admin authentication flow in frontend - admin login works at API level but frontend doesn't properly handle admin role-based access to /admin route. Check AuthContext and admin role verification in frontend components.
